items.title_en: Trump purges Election Assistance Commission members, months before midterms
items.title_zh: 特朗普在中期选举前几个月清洗选举援助委员会成员
items.desc_en: The White House said the Supreme Court's ruling allowing President Trump to fire FTC Commissioner Louise Slaughter provided the precedent for the removals.

items.title_en: Senate Democrats want hearings on Trump’s crypto holdings and foreign investors
items.title_zh: 参议院民主党人希望就特朗普的加密资产和外国投资者举行听证会
items.desc_en: Democratic Senators cited $1.4 billion in Trump family crypto income, unidentified investors and a reported UAE-backed stake in World Liberty Financial.
items.desc_zh: 民主党参议员列举了特朗普家族 14 亿美元的加密货币收入、身份不明的投资者以及据报道阿联酋支持的 World Liberty Financial 股份。

items.desc_en: Meta Platform's AI efforts are looking like the recipe for a comeback after an almost year-long drought in shares of the $1.7 trillion market-cap company.
items.desc_zh: Meta Platform 的人工智能努力看起来像是这家市值 1.7 万亿美元的公司在经历了近一年的股价低迷之后卷土重来的良方。

items.title_zh: 随着银行盈利临近，市场出现异常现象

items.title_en: Man fatally shot by ICE in Houston was not intended target, DHS says
items.title_zh: 国土安全部称，休斯敦被 ICE 枪杀的男子并非预定目标
items.desc_en: Immigration agents were looking for a different person when they shot Lorenzo Salgado Araujo during a traffic stop, officials say.

items.desc_zh: 在美国货币监理署批准其作为信托银行运营后，稳定币发行商 Circle 在盘前交易中飙升。

items.title_zh: 官方媒体称中国首次实现可重复使用火箭着陆

items.desc_zh: 此前，美国公司 SpaceX 和 Blue Origin 也曾进行过类似的可重复使用火箭着陆。

items.desc_en: Wall Street is coming off a winning day, following a jump in chipmakers and falling oil prices.
items.desc_zh: 在芯片制造商股价上涨和油价下跌之后，华尔街迎来了胜利的一天。

items.title_en: U.S. to continue 'technical talks' with Iran after Trump said ceasefire was 'over'
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示停火“结束”后，美国将继续与伊朗进行“技术谈判”
items.desc_en: The ceasefire signed last month came under serious strain in recent days as the U.S. and Iranian forces exchanged attacks for consecutive days this week.
items.desc_zh: 由于美国和伊朗军队本周连续几天交锋，上个月签署的停火协议最近几天受到严重压力。

items.title_en: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
items.title_zh: “90秒制冷”——假冒移动空调席卷网络
items.desc_en: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.
items.desc_zh: ASA 表示，声称小型设备可以快速冷却房间的广告好得令人难以置信。

items.title_en: Huge crowds in Mashhad as Iran's late supreme leader is buried
items.title_zh: 伊朗已故最高领导人下葬时，马什哈德聚集了大批人群
items.desc_en: Ali Khamenei was buried at the Imam Reza shrine, Iran's holiest Shia Muslim site, ending six days of public mourning ceremonies.
items.desc_zh: 阿里·哈梅内伊被安葬在伊朗最神圣的什叶派穆斯林圣地伊玛目礼萨圣地，结束了为期六天的公众哀悼仪式。

items.title_en: Pressure builds on Europe's biggest port to be greener
items.title_zh: 欧洲最大港口面临更加环保的压力
items.desc_en: A lawsuit demands that the Port of Rotterdam moves faster to cut its dependence on fossil fuel firms.
items.desc_zh: 一项诉讼要求鹿特丹港加快行动，减少对化石燃料公司的依赖。

items.title_en: Final Stage of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei’s Funeral Begins After Delay - The New York Times
items.title_zh: 阿亚图拉阿里·哈梅内伊葬礼的最后阶段在推迟后开始 - 纽约时报中文网
items.desc_en: Final Stage of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei’s Funeral Begins After Delay  The New York TimesIran’s Supreme Leader Remains Absent, a Void at the Top of the Regime  The New York TimesJuly 9, 2026 — US-Iran ce
items.desc_zh: 阿亚图拉阿里·哈梅内伊葬礼的最后阶段在推迟后开始纽约时报伊朗最高领袖仍然缺席，政权高层出现空缺纽约时报2026年7月9日——美国-伊朗

items.title_en: RepStandard
items.title_zh: RepStandard
items.desc_en: Computer vision counts your reps in real time
items.desc_zh: 计算机视觉实时计算您的次数

items.title_en: Palestinians mourn Gaza World Cup screenings organiser killed in Israeli strike
items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦人哀悼在以色列袭击中丧生的加沙世界杯放映组织者
items.desc_en: Aid worker Mohammed al-Wahidi had become a prominent humanitarian figure during the Israel-Hamas war.
items.desc_zh: 援助工作者穆罕默德·瓦希迪在以色列-哈马斯战争期间成为了一位杰出的人道主义人物。

items.title_en: Ukrainian agent accused of murdering Monaco bomb suspect changes story
items.title_zh: 被指控谋杀摩纳哥炸弹嫌疑人的乌克兰特工改变了故事
items.desc_en: Two men with links to Ukraine's security services are accused of killing Anastasiia Berezovska and dumping her body in woods.
items.desc_zh: 两名与乌克兰安全部门有联系的男子被指控杀害阿纳斯塔西娅·别列佐夫斯卡并将她的尸体扔在树林里。

items.title_en: Greek F-16 fighter jet crash-lands at busy Zakynthos airport
items.title_zh: 希腊F-16战斗机在繁忙的扎金索斯机场迫降
items.desc_en: The runway is closed after the jet reportedly landed without deploying its landing gear before bursting into flames.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，这架飞机在没有展开起落架的情况下着陆并起火，导致跑道关闭。

items.title_en: Ukraine strikes Russian ships near Crimea, escalating attacks on fuel supplies
items.title_zh: 乌克兰在克里米亚附近袭击俄罗斯船只，对燃料供应的袭击升级
items.desc_en: The attacks appear to be the latest phase of Ukraine's bid to choke off supplies and routes into and out of occupied Crimea.
items.desc_zh: 这些袭击似乎是乌克兰试图切断进出被占领克里米亚的供应和路线的最新阶段。

items.title_en: Democrat Graham Platner suspends campaign for key US Senate race after assault allegation
items.title_zh: 民主党人格雷厄姆·普拉特纳因袭击指控而暂停美国参议院关键竞选活动
items.desc_en: The decision came days after a woman accused him of sexual assault, an accusation he says is "categorically false".
items.desc_zh: 这一决定是在一名妇女指控他性侵犯几天后做出的，他说这一指控“绝对是错误的”。

items.title_en: Porn site company fined £630,000 over failed age checks
items.title_zh: 色情网站公司因未通过年龄检查被罚款 63 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom has fined a slew of sites it says are failing to prevent children accessing their adult content.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 对大量网站进行了罚款，称其未能阻止儿童访问其成人内容。

items.title_en: Outcry as Meta lets users make AI images from public Instagram profile pics

items.desc_en: The tech giant said people can opt out - but privacy campaigners called it a "recipe for disaster".
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，人们可以选择退出，但隐私活动人士称这是“灾难的秘诀”。

items.title_en: Robots available for rent: But what can they do?
items.title_zh: 可供出租的机器人：但它们能做什么？
items.desc_en: Robotics tech is changing fast, so for many it makes sense to rent a robot.
items.desc_zh: 机器人技术日新月异，因此对于许多人来说，租用机器人是有意义的。

items.title_en: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs and shrinks Xbox in 'significant restructure'
items.title_zh: 微软在“重大重组”中裁员 4,800 人并缩小 Xbox 规模
items.desc_en: The sweeping layoffs equate to 2.1% of Microsoft's workforce, with 1,600 immediate job losses at Xbox.
items.desc_zh: 这次大规模裁员相当于微软员工总数的 2.1%，Xbox 立即失业 1,600 人。

items.title_en: Parents warned not to publicly share children’s images amid AI abuse risks
items.title_zh: 家长警告不要公开分享儿童图像，以免存在人工智能滥用风险
items.desc_en: The NCA says there is a growing threat of children's images being used to create child abuse material.
items.desc_zh: NCA 表示，儿童图像被用来制作虐待儿童材料的威胁越来越大。

items.title_en: AI is 'not smart' so what's next in artificial intelligence?
items.title_zh: 人工智能“不聪明”，那么人工智能的下一步是什么？
items.desc_en: Leading AI researcher Yan LeCun has a start-up which is developing a more flexible AI system.
items.desc_zh: 领先的人工智能研究员严乐存拥有一家初创公司，正在开发更灵活的人工智能系统。

items.title_en: Meta glasses wearers hit with paywall to use built-in feature
items.title_zh: Meta 眼镜佩戴者需要付费才能使用内置功能
items.desc_en: A feature in Meta's glasses which boosts the voice of people will be capped at three hours for free use.
items.desc_zh: Meta眼镜中的一项增强人们声音的功能将被限制免费使用三个小时。

items.title_en: Google must pay €4.1bn fine for using Android to 'block' rivals
items.title_zh: 谷歌因使用 Android“阻止”竞争对手而须支付 41 亿欧元罚款
items.desc_en: A Google spokesperson said the judgement "fails to recognise" the firm's "significant investment to ensure Android remains open."
items.desc_zh: 谷歌发言人表示，该判决“未能认可”该公司“为确保 Android 保持开放而进行的重大投资”。

items.title_en: Don't expect trackers to save your stolen car, experts say
items.title_zh: 专家表示，不要指望追踪器能够拯救你被盗的汽车
items.desc_en: Kia told the BBC UK law prevented its location tracking function being used to live track vehicles.
items.desc_zh: 起亚告诉英国广播公司，英国法律禁止其位置跟踪功能用于实时跟踪车辆。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: We hear concerns that shadow banning is limiting access to health advice for women.
items.desc_zh: 我们听到有人担心影子禁令限制了女性获得健康建议的机会。
